services.title: How can we help you?
services.subtitle: Two clear paths for different needs: choose the service that fits your situation, share the most important details, and send your request in just a few minutes. This helps our team understand what you need faster, reduce back-and-forth, and prepare the right next step more clearly.

items.title: Cleaning service
items.description: Professional cleaning support for homes, shared buildings, and recurring maintenance needs, with clear coordination and service adapted to the condition and rhythm of each space.

items.title: Home service
items.description: Flexible home support for practical tasks, minor fixes, and everyday upkeep, organized through a simple request flow so each visit is planned with the right context from the start.

benefits.title: Comfortable for customers — efficient for the team.
benefits.description: Havenova reduces back-and-forth, clarifies requests, and keeps workflows clean: fewer misunderstandings, faster offers, better planning.

items.title: Clear requests
items.description: Forms collect exactly the information needed — without stress.

items.title: Faster offers
items.description: Fewer follow-ups, quicker matching, and better response times.

items.title: Better planning
items.description: Services can be prioritized and coordinated with clarity.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Status and communication in one place — clear for both sides.

hero.title: Why Home Service Feels Easier
descriptions: Learn how Havenova combines personal service, clear communication, and ongoing digital improvement to create a more transparent experience for clients across Berlin.

image.alt: Havenova home service professional in Berlin

story.title: A Young Company with a Clear Vision
paragraphs: Havenova was founded in 2023 with a clear idea: to offer home cleaning and home service in Berlin with the customer at the center.
From the beginning, the company has worked to stand out by focusing on customer experience and maintaining clear and professional communication at every stage of the service.

In its first years, Havenova has actively participated in the development of this digital platform together with Maped Solutions. This tool was created to simplify service requests, improve communication, and offer full transparency to users.
Our focus remains the same: to improve every day, adapt to the needs of our clients, and continue developing digital solutions that benefit both customers and companies in the sector.

clients.title: Who we work with
clients.description: We support different kinds of homes and businesses that need reliable cleaning or home service, with a process built around clarity, communication, and long-term trust.

a11y.sectionLabel: Clients and sectors Havenova works with

items.title: Private properties
items.description: We work with tenants and homeowners who want a reliable way to request cleaning or home service, track each job, and keep a clear record of everything that has been done.
items.imageAlt: Residential building in a private neighborhood

items.title: Property management
items.description: We support property management companies by structuring service requests, improving communication, and keeping a transparent overview of home service and cleaning across multiple properties.

items.title: Offices and practices
items.description: We help offices and professional practices manage recurring cleaning and home service with clear schedules, documented work, and minimal administrative effort.

items.title: Small businesses
items.description: We work with small businesses that need dependable cleaning or home service, offering a simple process to request help, follow progress, and keep everything organized.

clients.closing: Our focus is on clarity, organization, and long-term reliability.

servicesCta.title: Choose the service that fits what you need today
servicesCta.description: If you already know what kind of help you need, go straight to the right form and send your request with the right context from the first step.

hero.title: Home Services, Simplified for Customers
descriptions: Havenova is the company behind this platform for cleaning and home service. We helped build a streamlined workflow so customers can request help in minutes and service companies can manage requests, scheduling, and updates efficiently.

image.alt: Havenova workflow for home services in Berlin

workflow.title: How the workflow works
workflow.subtitle: A practical flow that keeps requests structured — without forcing fixed prices or complicated forms.

steps.title: Request & review
steps.description: You send a service request with the relevant details. We review the information carefully to understand your needs and prepare the next step.

steps.title: Visit & confirmation
steps.description: We visit the location to check the details on site. Based on this visit, we confirm the scope of the work and send you the final offer.

steps.title: Service & completion
steps.description: We carry out the service as agreed and keep you informed throughout the process. Once everything is completed, we send you the invoice.

note.title: Why we don’t show fixed prices on the website?
note.description: Many home services depend on context (size, condition, materials, access, time). Havenova keeps requests structured so the company can price fairly — and the customer knows exactly what is included.

benefits.title: Benefits for both sides
benefits.description: This platform was created to build long-term relationships between Havenova and its customers, based on trust, clarity, and shared information. It ensures you always know what was requested, what was agreed, and what was delivered. Ready to request your first service?

hero.subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data is processed in connection with this platform, the tenant-specific services offered through it, and the technical operation provided by Maped Solutions.

overview.title: Overview
overview.intro: Protecting personal data is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains which party is responsible for which processing activity, for which purposes personal data is processed, and what rights users have.
bullets: For the service relationship with end users, the respective client will usually act as the controller within the meaning of Art. 4(7) GDPR.

Maped Solutions (sole proprietorship) supports the technical operation of the platform and may act, depending on the processing context, as a processor, an independent controller, or a joint controller.

The platform uses a global base account structure for authentication, security, and technical account administration; service-specific profiles and operational relationships are managed separately for each client or service.
Depending on the specific processing activity, legal bases may in particular include Art. 6(1)(a), (b), (c), and (f) GDPR.
Transfers outside the EEA take place only where necessary and subject to appropriate safeguards.
The specific data protection role of Maped Solutions depends on the respective processing context.
Maped Solutions can act as its own responsible entity for platform-wide functions such as authentication, security, and technical operation.
For the processing of personal data in connection with the services offered by the respective customer, Maped Solutions generally acts as a data processor on behalf of the respective customer.
In some cases, joint responsibilities may also exist.

controller.title: Role of the respective client
controller.body: Where personal data is processed for the initiation, performance, and administration of the specific service offered, the respective client will generally be the controller. This includes, in particular, the operational handling of users, service requests, appointments, work orders, customer communication, invoicing, and similar service-related processes.

processor.title: Role of Maped Solutions as technical operator
processor.body: Maped Solutions technically operates the platform and supports secure operation, authentication, infrastructure, abuse prevention, and protective measures. Depending on the specific processing activity, Maped Solutions may act as a processor, an independent controller, or, where legally justified, a joint controller. It would therefore be inaccurate to describe every processing activity on the platform as being carried out exclusively on the client's instructions.

contacts.title: Identity and contact details
contacts.intro: The following contact details identify the parties relevant for data protection in connection with this platform and the offered services.

controller.title: Controller for the offered services
controller.description: For the service relationship with end users, the responsible business shown below is generally the controller.

technicalOperator.title: Technical platform operator
technicalOperator.description: The following operator is responsible for the technical operation, security, and infrastructure of the platform.

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer / privacy contact
dpo.description: If a Data Protection Officer or dedicated privacy contact exists, the details are shown below.

accountStructure.title: Global accounts and service-specific profiles
accountStructure.body: The platform may use a central base account structure so that the same person can authenticate across multiple services or clients. However, separate relationships and profiles are maintained within each individual service. A profile for one service is therefore not automatically identical to all other uses of the platform.

purposesAndLegalBases.title: Purposes and Legal Bases
purposesAndLegalBases.intro: Personal data is processed exclusively for lawful and clearly defined purposes.

examples.title: Examples:
examples.description: user accounts, service requests, communication, invoicing

examples.title: Examples:
examples.description: server logs, abuse prevention, system security

dataCategories.title: Categories of Data
dataCategories.description: Depending on platform usage, the following data may be processed:
items: Identification and contact data (name, email address, phone number, address).
Account and security data (encrypted passwords, roles, language settings).
Contractual and billing-related data (for example invoices or related business records where applicable).
Technical data (IP address, device information, server logs, strictly necessary cookies).
Purpose-bound minimum data in individual technical datasets (e.g. for documentation, billing or fulfillment of legal obligations).

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Service Providers
thirdParties.subtitle: This overview refers to technical providers that may be required to operate the platform (e.g., hosting, infrastructure, data storage, email delivery).
thirdParties.intro: No providers are used for analytics or marketing.

body.name: Vercel
body.purpose: Frontend hosting and operations, technical logs

body.name: Cloudflare R2
body.purpose: Storage and delivery of static assets

security.title: Security Measures
security.body: Appropriate technical and organizational measures pursuant to Art. 32 GDPR are implemented, including encrypted passwords, secure data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), role-based access control, and firewall/CDN protection.

cookies.title: Cookies and comparable technologies
cookies.body: This platform currently uses only strictly necessary cookies and comparable technical storage and access technologies. Where such technologies are required for authentication, security, session control, language settings, or other strictly necessary functions, they are used to ensure the secure operation of the platform. No analytics, marketing, or tracking technologies are implemented on this platform.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.intro: Data subjects have the following rights under the GDPR:
items: Access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction of processing (Art. 18).
Withdrawal of consent (Art. 7(3)) where processing is based on consent.
Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77).
userRights.howTo: Requests concerning the offered services should generally be addressed to the responsible business shown on this page. Maped Solutions may provide technical assistance in handling requests, in particular where they relate to platform-wide authentication, security, or account administration. Identification may be required, and responses are generally provided, or technically supported, within one month.

accountDeletion.title: Deletion of a service-specific account
accountDeletion.body: If you delete your account for a specific service or client, the related service-specific profile will generally be deleted and the active relationship with that service will be ended or deactivated. Any underlying base account structure used for authentication, or other active relationships with other clients or services, will generally remain unaffected. Where other functional domains still require minimal residual data, for example for invoicing, legal documentation, evidentiary purposes, or statutory retention obligations, only the data necessary for that separate purpose will be retained. Such residual data will not be used to recover or reactivate the deleted profile.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: Personal data is retained only for as long as necessary for the relevant purpose. If a service-specific profile is deleted, that profile and the related active service relationship will generally be removed or deactivated. Where other functional domains require minimal snapshots or residual records for legal, evidentiary, documentation, or billing purposes, only that purpose-bound data will be kept for the required retention period. Such residual data is not sufficient to reconstruct the deleted profile.

additional.title: The specific storage duration depends in particular on:
bullets: statutory retention obligations
billing-related requirements
as well as the need to assert or defend legal claims.
additional.close: Once these purposes cease to apply, data will be deleted or, where possible, anonymized.

items.title: Requirement to provide data
items.body: Providing personal data is necessary to use the platform and, where applicable, to request or receive the offered services. Without this data, registration, secure login, and use of relevant service functions may not be possible.

items.title: Data sources
items.body: We process data you provide as well as technical usage data generated when using the platform (e.g., log files).

items.title: Automated decision-making
items.body: No automated decision-making, including profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR, takes place.

items.title: Privacy contact
items.body: If a Data Protection Officer or dedicated privacy contact exists, the relevant contact details will be provided on this page, in the Imprint, or upon request.

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.body: If personal data is processed outside the EEA, this occurs exclusively with appropriate safeguards, in particular the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission. Where necessary, supplementary technical, contractual, or organizational measures are implemented to ensure an adequate level of data protection.

changes.title: Changes to this Privacy Policy
changes.body: This Privacy Policy may be updated where legal requirements, technical services, or actual processing activities change.

items.label: European Data Protection Board – Supervisory authorities

hero.subtitle: This policy explains the use of cookies and comparable technologies on this platform, including the strictly necessary technical functions required for authentication, security, language preferences, and related platform operation.

overview.title: Overview
overview.intro: This platform currently uses only strictly necessary cookies and comparable technologies, such as browser storage, to provide login, security, language settings, session management, and other core functions. No analytics, marketing, or tracking technologies are implemented on this platform, and the cookie banner serves as an informational layer for this current setup.
bullets: Strictly necessary cookies and comparable technologies support core platform functions.
No analytics or tracking technologies are used.
No advertising or marketing tracking is carried out.
Cookies and local storage technologies can be managed through browser and platform settings.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies and comparable technologies?
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies are small text files that may be stored on or read from your device. In addition, the platform may use comparable technologies such as browser storage. These technologies support, among other things, secure login, navigation, session management, and protection against misuse.

types.title: What cookies and comparable technologies are used?

items.name: Strictly necessary technologies
items.description: Strictly necessary cookies or comparable storage mechanisms may be used to provide authentication, security, session management, language settings, and similar core platform functions.

items.name: No analytics or marketing features
items.description: No non-essential analytics, advertising, marketing, or tracking features are implemented on this platform.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.body: External technical service providers may be involved where necessary to provide the platform infrastructure. Where cookies or comparable technologies are used in that context, this is limited to strictly necessary technical functions only.

localStorage.title: Browser storage and comparable technologies
localStorage.body: In addition to cookies, the platform may use local browser storage technologies such as localStorage to store technical preferences or states on your device. This may include, for example, language preferences or technical status information related to the current session or cookie notice. This information is used for technical delivery and user guidance and is not shared with third parties merely because it is stored locally.

management.title: Managing cookies and storage technologies
management.intro: You can manage or delete cookies at any time via your browser settings. You can also remove locally stored information in your browser or on your device. Disabling strictly necessary technologies may affect the functionality of the platform. The cookie notice can also be reopened to review the current information shown by the platform.
methods: Delete stored cookies via the browser.
Restrict or block cookies using browser features.
Remove locally stored settings from your device.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: Where access to or storage of information on your device is required for the technically necessary provision of the platform, this takes place on the basis of Section 25 TDDDG for strictly necessary technologies. Where personal data is further processed in that context, such processing will generally rely on Art. 6(1)(b) or (f) GDPR, depending on whether the processing is required for the requested platform function or for legitimate technical and security interests. No non-essential analytics or marketing technologies are implemented on this platform.

changes.title: Changes to this Cookie Policy
changes.body: This Cookie Policy may be updated where legal requirements, technical services, or the actual use of storage technologies on the platform changes. The date of the last update is displayed on this page.

hero.subtitle: These Terms of Service govern the use of this platform and define the rights and obligations of the involved parties.

overview.title: Scope
overview.intro: These Terms of Service apply to the use of the platform functions made available through this website. Additional service-specific commercial conditions may arise directly between the end user and the responsible business.
bullets: The platform is technically operated by Maped Solutions (sole proprietorship).
The respective end-user services are generally provided by the respective client.
The platform may use a global base account structure for authentication and security.
Service-specific profiles, operational relationships, and functional records are maintained separately for each client or service.

items.definition: The web-based software solution for managing services and requests.
The responsible business offering services to end users through the platform.
Individuals or legal entities using the platform.
Maped Solutions as the technical operator of the platform.
The platform-wide account that may be used for authentication, account security, and technical access administration.
The profile maintained within a specific client or service context and not automatically applicable to other services.

parties.title: Contractual parties and platform roles
parties.intro: The following information clarifies which business provides the offered services and which party operates the platform technically.

serviceProvider.title: Business responsible for the offered services
serviceProvider.description: The contractual relationship for the offered end-user services generally exists with the responsible business shown below.

technicalOperator.title: Technical platform operator
technicalOperator.description: The following operator provides the technical platform, infrastructure, maintenance, and security, but does not itself provide the client’s offered services.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.body: Maped Solutions (sole proprietorship) provides the client with a production-ready software platform. The service includes technical operation, maintenance, and continuous optimization.
serviceDescription.note: Making the platform available does not by itself make Maped Solutions the contractual provider of the services offered by the client.

optimization.title: Continuous Optimization
optimization.body: Continuous optimization includes technical improvements, security updates, bug fixes, and performance adjustments. Functional extensions require a separate agreement.

userObligations.title: User Obligations
items: No misuse or unlawful use of the platform.

availability.title: Availability
availability.body: Maped Solutions (sole proprietorship) strives to ensure high platform availability. Continuous or uninterrupted availability cannot be guaranteed.

externalContractors.title: External Contractors
externalContractors.body: Clients may engage external contractors to deliver their services. The client is solely responsible for the actions and compliance of such contractors.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Maped Solutions (sole proprietorship) is liable only for damages caused by intent or gross negligence. In cases of slight negligence, liability is limited to breaches of essential contractual obligations and foreseeable damages.
limitations: No liability for services provided by the client or external contractors.
No liability for data loss if appropriate backup measures were in place.
No liability for indirect damages or loss of profit.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: If the offered services involve payments, invoices, or similar commercial arrangements, those matters are generally governed by the relationship between the end user and the responsible client, unless expressly stated otherwise. The platform itself does not provide payment services.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: Use of a specific service or the relationship with a specific client may be terminated in accordance with the applicable terms and any service-specific arrangements. Terminating one service does not automatically delete other active relationships or other service-specific profiles of the same person. Details regarding data deletion are set out in the Privacy Policy.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.body: Personal data is processed in accordance with this platform’s Privacy Policy. That policy distinguishes between platform-wide account management, service-specific profiles, and other functional records with their own retention purposes.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: The laws of the Federal Republic of Germany apply, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.

changes.title: Changes to these Terms
changes.body: These Terms may be updated where legal, technical, or operational requirements change. Where required, users will be informed appropriately about material updates. The current version remains available on this platform.

hero.subtitle: This page contains the legally required information about the business responsible for the offered services and about the technical operator of this platform.

serviceProviderSection.heading: Business responsible for the offered services
serviceProviderSection.description: The services offered through this website are provided by the respective business shown below. For questions about service requests, appointments, quotes, invoices, cancellations, or customer support, please contact that business directly.

technicalOperatorSection.heading: Technical platform operator
technicalOperatorSection.description: This website and the underlying digital platform are technically operated, maintained, and secured by the operator shown below. The technical operator does not provide the household or service work offered by the client business itself.

contactGuidanceSection.heading: Who should I contact?
items: For service requests, appointments, quotes, invoices, cancellations, or complaints about the offered services, contact the responsible business shown above.
For technical issues with the website, login, account access, or platform security, contact the technical operator.

providerSection.heading: Legacy technical operator
providerSection.description: Fallback values used until tenant-specific legal data is fully populated.

liabilitySection.heading: Disclaimer
liabilitySection.text: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

odrSection.heading: Consumer dispute resolution
odrSection.text: We are not obliged or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

support.heading: Support tickets
support.description: Describe the issue and we will create a support ticket for you.

page.title: Property Managers
page.subtitle: Manage contact details, access status, and building assignments for your team.

confirm.activateDescription: This manager will regain access to the dashboard.
confirm.deactivateDescription: This manager will lose access to the dashboard.
